required_sections.name: Reading context
required_sections.rationale: Defines where the type system will be read and at what density.

required_sections.name: Scale and role map
required_sections.rationale: Maps text roles to scale, weight, and hierarchy rules.

required_sections.name: Readability rules
required_sections.rationale: Names line length, contrast, spacing, or emphasis boundaries.

required_sections.name: Adoption guidance
required_sections.rationale: Shows how to phase the new type system into the artifact.
